svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="2" border="0"> <diagram name="Research Flow" id="research1"> <mxGraphModel dx="729" dy="1202" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="3340" pageHeight="820" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="pool" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;horizontal=1;html=1;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="Research / Calculator Journey" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="750" width="3240" x="30" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane0" parent="pool" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;startSize=40;" value="Visitor" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="3240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" parent="lane0" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=15;" value="Visitor lands on<br>Home, mortgage rates,<br>or Learn/blog article" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="200" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="lane0" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=15;" value="Selects intent
(e.g., buying +
researching)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="580" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" parent="lane0" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=15;" value="Exits site /
navigates elsewhere
(bounce)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="910" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s6" parent="lane0" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=15;" value="Clicks 'Explore all
calculators' or a
specific calculator" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="1200" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s9" parent="lane0" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=15;" value="Visitor leaves
(soft conversion
opportunity lost)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="1800" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane1" parent="pool" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;startSize=40;" value="Marketing Site /
Content" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="3240" x="10" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="lane1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=15;" value="Displays 'Build your
estimate' widget" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="400" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s10" parent="lane1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=15;" value="End: Lead captured
(rate alerts email,
no full application)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="1800" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge4" edge="1" parent="lane1" source="d1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=15;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.0847" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="980" y="-60" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="990" y="150" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="980" y="-60" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1ASCCbj4eOxsQCQttlS-56" parent="lane1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=15;" value="Arrives via Learn/
education article
(alternate entry path)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="2150" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1ASCCbj4eOxsQCQttlS-57" parent="lane1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=15;" value="Article shows embedded CTAs &amp; related article links" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="2350" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1ASCCbj4eOxsQCQttlS-61" edge="1" parent="lane1" source="t1ASCCbj4eOxsQCQttlS-56" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=15;" target="t1ASCCbj4eOxsQCQttlS-57" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1ASCCbj4eOxsQCQttlS-58" parent="lane1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=15;" value="Clicks related

Learn content)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="2620" y="160" /> <mxPoint x="2420" y="160" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="2420" y="120" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1ASCCbj4eOxsQCQttlS-59" parent="lane1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=15;" value="Clicks CTA?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="2750" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1ASCCbj4eOxsQCQttlS-64" edge="1" parent="lane1" source="t1ASCCbj4eOxsQCQttlS-58" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=15;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="t1ASCCbj4eOxsQCQttlS-59" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1ASCCbj4eOxsQCQttlS-66" edge="1" parent="lane1" source="t1ASCCbj4eOxsQCQttlS-59" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=15;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.438;entryY=-0.014;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="t1ASCCbj4eOxsQCQttlS-57" value="No (continues
browsing)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="2820" y="20" /> <mxPoint x="2420" y="20" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="estimateChatNote" parent="lane1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=15;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;dashed=1;size=20;" value="<span style="font-family: &quot;Anthropic Sans&quot;, system-ui, &quot;Segoe UI&quot;, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; text-align: start;"><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(226, 225, 218), rgb(255, 255, 255));">After this step, expect an AI chat assistant. User to click through options.</font></span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="680" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5M_EZ50fG_ojBYQRkRSh-1" edge="1" parent="lane1" source="s4" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;startArrow=classic;startFill=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="789.58" y="215" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="790" y="125" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane2" parent="pool" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;startSize=40;" value="Calculator Tools" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="3240" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" parent="lane2" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=15;" value="Displays today's rate
table (30yr fixed, FHA,

monthly payment
breakdown (P&I, taxes,
insurance, PMI)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="1400" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d2" parent="lane2" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=15;" value="Satisfied /
